name: forktex-py
description: ForkTex Python repo — the CLI, agent, architecture discovery, FSD audit, and orchestration toolkit (single-package repo)

build.description: Build sdist + wheel into dist/ and verify metadata with twine check

publish-test.description: Upload dist/ to TestPyPI (https://test.pypi.org) for rehearsal. SDK deps must already be on TestPyPI.

publish.description: Upload dist/ to production PyPI (irreversible per-version)

dev-link-sdks.description: pip install -e the three sibling SDK repos (cloud/intelligence/network) for local development against source trees
commands: @bash -c 'for d in ../cloud/sdk-py ../intelligence/sdk-py ../network/sdk-py; do [ -d "$$d" ] || { echo "missing: $$d"; exit 1; }; done'
@echo 'linked. export FORKTEX_DEV_SIBLING_SDKS=1 to flag the dev-linked banner on forktex --version'

dev-unlink-sdks.description: Reinstall the three SDKs from their pinned PyPI versions, restoring the published surface

dev-install.description: One-shot editable install of the four ecosystem packages (cloud, intelligence, network SDKs + forktex-py CLI) from sibling source trees
commands: @bash -c 'for d in ../cloud/sdk-py ../intelligence/sdk-py ../network/sdk-py; do [ -d "$$d" ] || { echo "missing: $$d"; exit 1; }; done'
@echo 'installed. run "export FORKTEX_DEV_SIBLING_SDKS=1" to flag the dev-linked banner on forktex --version.'

packages.name: forktex
packages.description: CLI, agent, MCP-style orchestrator, architecture discovery, and audit toolkit for ForkTex
